member.name: M:GTA.Ped.GetAllLoadedModelsAppropriateForAmbientPeds
member.summary:
Gets an array of all loaded
s that is appropriate to spawn as ambient vehicles. The result array can contains animal hashes, which CREATE_RANDOM_PED excludes to spawn. All the model hashes of the elements are loaded and the
s with the model hashes can be spawned immediately.
